title: Split, Split-Dalmatia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Split, Split-Dalmatia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Split is a city in Split-Dalmatia with a population of 178,102. The vibrant heart of Dalmatia, built around the UNESCO-listed Diocletian’s Palace, with stunning Adriatic views, a lively waterfront promenade, and island-hopping access.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
